title: PB-150 VERIFIED: Runtime Extraction Wave 1 Package
scope: Evidence-only Wave 1 package for runtime-policy-validator, runtime branch hygiene divergence, and evidence signature pipeline.

dependencies.rationale: Foundation policy validator has no Wave 1 dependency and should be extracted first.
Branch hygiene decision paths depend on stable runtime policy validation semantics.
Evidence signature pipeline should follow policy validation and governed release hygiene so audit-producing extraction PRs are controlled.
